    "Issue a non-conformance report (NCR)",
    "Consult engineering for a remediation plan (e.g., coupling nuts, thread extensions, or bolt replacement)",

  "rationale": "API RP 686 requires a minimum anchor bolt projection (typically at least 1.5 to 2 threads, or a minimum length equal to the bolt diameter depending on the specific section) above the fully engaged nut. Insufficient projection prevents proper thread engagement and tensioning, compromising the structural integrity of the equipment foundation.",

    "API RP 686 Chapter 4"
  ]
